TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Rumen_Radev, title = Rumen_Radev, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Rumen_Radev} }

S.FORM: Rumen Radev ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Rumen Radev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Bulgaria ta' misuw hya' ga Rumen Radev, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Rumen Radev ryax sa tay 18 nqu tay 6, Rumen Radev, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1963) mrhuw Bulgaria ta' misuw hya' ga Rumen Radev, aring ryax tay 22 squ byacing tay 1 sa kawas 2017 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: rumen ra*e* rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, rumen ra*e*, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βulɣaria taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa rumen ra*e*, ariŋ rjax taj ** s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
